LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS TO CLARIFY RELIEF REQUESTED IN LIGHT OF PARAGRAPH 53, WHICH APPEARS TO CONTEMPLATE ANALYSIS OF INDIVIDUAL CIRCUMSTANCES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-17-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
